rationale: No events with direct impact on Portugal this cycle; Iran deal uncertainty continues as the main indirect energy price concern for a western EU resident.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump claims Sunday signing, Tehran disputes
top_events.summary: If a deal materialises, lower global oil prices would benefit Portugal's energy-import-dependent economy, but no resolution yet.

top_events.title: Gold price trending down
top_events.summary: Declining gold prices signal reduced global risk premium; minor positive signal for broader EU financial stability relevant to Portugal.

top_events.title: Switzerland votes to cap population at 10 million
top_events.summary: Swiss referendum on immigration cap has negligible direct impact on Portugal but reflects broader European migration debate.
